name: Dramaturge of Despia
name_jp: デスピアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大導劇神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラマトゥルギア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Great Guiding Drama God of Despia
desc: If a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. If this card in your hand or field is used as Fusion Material, and sent to the GY or banished: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Dramaturge of Despia" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. If this card in your hand or field is used as Fusion Material, and sent to the GY or banished: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Dramaturge of Despia" once per turn.
eff: If a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. If this card in your hand or field is used as Fusion Material, and sent to the GY or banished: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Dramaturge of Despia" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Activates if used as Fusion Material
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
